trans-unit.source: Execute a specific pipeline step and its dependencies
trans-unit.target: Executar uma etapa específica do pipeline e suas dependências. (Visualização)

trans-unit.source: The 'step' argument is required when using --list-steps. Example: 'aspire do deploy --list-steps'. Common starting steps are 'build', 'publish' and 'deploy'. See https://aspire.dev/reference/cli/commands/aspire-do/ for the full list of pipeline steps.
trans-unit.target: The 'step' argument is required when using --list-steps. Example: 'aspire do deploy --list-steps'. Common starting steps are 'build', 'publish' and 'deploy'. See https://aspire.dev/reference/cli/commands/aspire-do/ for the full list of pipeline steps.

trans-unit.source: The optional output path for artifacts
trans-unit.target: O caminho de saída opcional para artefatos.

trans-unit.source: The name of the step to execute
trans-unit.target: O nome da etapa a ser executada.
